name: Water Facts
description: Fascinating water facts to make you think while you drink
messages: Your brain is 75% water. Feed it! 🧠💧
Hot water freezes faster than cold. The Mpemba effect! ❄️
Earth has ~326 million trillion gallons of water 🌍
A jellyfish is 95% water. Stay hydrated, jellyfish! 🪼
Water can dissolve more substances than any other liquid 💧
The average human body contains ~37 liters of water 🫀
Freshwater makes up only 3% of Earth's water 🏔️
Drinking water can improve short-term memory 🧠
A single cloud can hold millions of gallons ☁️
Water expands by 9% when it freezes — that's unique! ❄️
Your blood is 92% water. Drink up! 🩸
The longest river is the Nile: 4,132 miles 🌊
71% of Earth's surface is water 💧
Babies are ~78% water at birth. Precious hydration! 👶
Mild dehydration impairs concentration and mood 😔💧
A tomato is 95% water. You? About 60% 🍅
The deepest ocean point is 36,000 feet down 🌊
Water regulates your body temperature 💧
Sound travels 4.3x faster in water than air 🐋
An elephant can smell water from 12 miles away 🐘
